headline: Sable Offshore to Restart Oil Production at Santa Ynez. What It Means for the Stock.
summary: The Trump administration greenlights Sable Offshore’s efforts to restart a pipeline system off the California coast.

headline: Which energy stocks have led and lagged since the Iran conflict
summary: Investing.com — Energy stocks have shown sharp divergence since the start of the Iran conflict, with refiners and LNG-linked companies emerging as the biggest winners while several oilfield services and infrastructure names have lagged, according to a recent Goldman Sachs note.

headline: Some oil-loading operations in UAE hub of Fujairah suspended after fire: Reuters
summary: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps said U.S. interests in the UAE including ports are targets after U.S. attack on Iranian island.

headline: U.S. moves to stabilize energy markets with the release of 86 million oil barrels
summary: Investing.com -- The Trump administration has initiated a massive drawdown of the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR), issuing a formal request on Friday to exchange 86 million barrels of crude oil. The move, aimed at stabilizing global energy markets, marks the start of a broader 172-million-barrel release announced earlier this week as the U.S. and its allies scramble to curb soaring fuel costs.

headline: Exxon (XOM) Plans Legal Shift to Texas after More than a Century in New Jersey
summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 10, The Wall Street Journal reported that Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) plans to move its legal home to Texas from New Jersey. The decision would place the company among a growing group of firms that have chosen […]
